mention.text: @cursorsupport i got charged even though i did the 2 week pro trial. contact sales won't take my gmail. is there any support i can contact?

triage.summary: User reports being charged despite a 2-week Pro trial; this requires account-specific billing/invoice verification. The provided sources cover general billing/proration and overages but do not confirm trial-charge handling, so route to hi@cursor.com.

suggested_response: Route to hi@cursor.com for account-specific billing review (trial-charge dispute). Keep the public X reply short; avoid discussing trial policy details without a verified doc/case reference.
suggested_reply:
Please email hi@cursor.com so the team can review the charge and your trial status for your account. Include the account email and the charge date/time. 

Public support here can’t verify invoice/timeline details.

slack_message:
new mention: @cursorsupport i got charged even though i did the 2 week pro trial. contact sales won't take my gmail. is there any support i can contact?
suggested response: Route to hi@cursor.com for account-specific billing review (trial-charge dispute). Keep the public X reply short; avoid discussing trial policy details without a verified doc/case reference.
suggested reply: Please email hi@cursor.com so the team can review the charge and your trial status for your account. Include the account email and the charge date/time. 

Public support here can’t verify invoice/timeline details.

link to post: https://x.com/trialcharged/status/trial-charged-no-contact
sources: https://cursor.com/help/account-and-billing/billing, https://cursor.com/help/account-and-billing/teams-management, https://cursor.com/help/account-and-billing/overages

fallback.reason: The current Cursor help sources provided do not contain a clear, citation-backed policy for charges that occur during/after a Pro trial, so we should not guess the outcome or cause.
fallback.manual_next_step: Direct the user to hi@cursor.com for invoice/trial status verification; do not request sensitive billing info in the public thread.
